summary: Created 'LTX Progress Bar' (recreated clean; MPI-141 was the deleted original orphaned by next_id drift).

Picked up LTX progress bar. Rewrote progressAggregator to rgthree node-count + per-node-step model (no class_type weight guessing); fixes LTX 50%-snap, SamplerCustomAdvanced zero-weight, Ultimate 90%-stall. Self-check passes; pending live verify.

LTX progress bar SHIPPED (commit 3a09e4f). Stdout-tqdm-driven per-stage status bar replaces the broken WS-weighted bar. Verified live: LTX 3/2/1, WAN 2/2, detailer 1/N, Ultimate upscaler 2-tile, universal upscale pulse. Timer unified at prompt_ack. Docs in generation README + builder playbook + gotchas. Remote (Pod wrapper stdout-parse) deferred.

Reopened: LOCAL path shipped + verified (3a09e4f), but REMOTE (Pod) still falls back to the broken WS bar. The bar must work everywhere, so card stays open until the Pod wrapper pipes+parses ComfyUI stdout. Handoff created for a fresh session to do the mpi-ci wrapper.py change + live Pod verify.

REMOTE path shipped + live-verified. Pod wrapper 0.2.19 (mpi-ci 075933f) pipes ComfyUI stdout (stdout=PIPE, chunk reader) and broadcasts comfy:step/tile/segment SSE — direct port of routes/comfy.js _handleComfyOutput. Published via publish-runtime.sh (R2 no-rebuild). Live-verified on a fresh A4500 Pod: LTX t2v showed Stage 1->2->3 with per-step fill, identical to local; gen completed. Parser self-checked 8 cases. gotchas remote-fallback note flipped. Bar now works local AND remote — card complete.
